name: aws-startup-advisor
description: AI-powered build and migrate guidance from AWS, built for startups at any stage.

interface.shortDescription: Build and migrate on AWS with startup-focused architecture, cost, and security guidance plus a GCP-to-AWS migration workflow.
interface.longDescription:
AWS Startup Advisor brings four sibling skills together for startups building and migrating on AWS.

knowledge-base-for-startups is an AWS Startups reference base (Activate FAQ, credits, programs, partner offers, sample architectures, and 277+ learn articles). prompt-library-for-startups offers 29+ copy-paste prompts plus downloadable installable agents. start-building-for-startups runs an interactive discovery workflow that scaffolds an AWS architecture into your codebase.

migration-to-aws runs a structured 6-phase GCP-to-AWS migration assessment — discovering what you have, clarifying requirements, designing the AWS architecture, estimating costs with real pricing data, and generating runnable migration artifacts. It also migrates AI and agentic workloads (OpenAI/Gemini to Amazon Bedrock, LangChain/CrewAI/AutoGen to AWS-native frameworks).
defaultPrompt: Help me build an MVP on AWS
Find AWS Startups articles on cost optimization
Migrate my GCP infrastructure to AWS
Migrate my OpenAI app to Amazon Bedrock
Estimate AWS costs for my GCP workload
